name: Shopify sellers processing 10–50 sales commissions/week tool
description: For Shopify sellers processing 10–50 sales commissions/week, delayed reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate commission reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation and sporadic payout summaries.
